'''Vrakolian spinblades''' were a variety of small razor-edged throwing discs that were produced by the [[Vrakolian]]. The thick-skinned [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] typically used these blades as part of certain games of skill, while other species adopted them for use as deadly weapons. A skilled thrower could make the blades curve in flight, allowing them to hit targets under cover.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Bacta Heist|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
